description: User clicks the next month arrow in the calendar to view October and November 2026
frame_description: The user is interacting with the date picker on the Hostelworld homepage.

description: User selects November 9th as the check-in date
frame_description: The user selects the start date for their stay.

description: User selects November 15th as the check-out date
frame_description: The user selects the end date for their stay, completing the date range selection.

description: User clicks the 'Let's go!' button to search for hostels
frame_description: The user initiates the search with the selected dates and location.

description: The page navigates to the search results for London
frame_description: The browser loads the search results page showing available hostels.

description: User examines the search results, hovering over hostel listings
frame_description: The user pauses to look at the list of hostels, including Palmers Lodge and Wombat's City Hostel.

description: User clicks the 'Map' button to switch to map view
frame_description: The user clicks the map icon in the top right of the results list.

description: The UI updates to show a map of hostel locations alongside the list
frame_description: The screen layout changes to include an interactive map.
